summary: Completed testing of Bearer Token Authentication migration from cookie-based auth. All 12 backend tests pass. Frontend correctly uses Authorization Bearer header from localStorage. No withCredentials or credentials:include found in frontend code.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/auth/me works with Authorization: Bearer header
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 without token
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 with invalid token
Backend: Protected endpoints (/api/lessons) work with Bearer token
Backend: Protected endpoints return 401 without token
Backend: CORS does NOT include access-control-allow-credentials: true
Backend: CORS allows Authorization header (preflight returns 204)
Backend: POST /api/auth/google endpoint exists (returns 400 for missing credential)
Backend: GET /api/schemes works with Bearer token
Backend: GET /api/schemes returns 401 without token
Backend: GET /api/uploads works with Bearer token
Backend: GET /api/dictations works with Bearer token
Frontend: api.js has axios interceptor that adds Authorization header from localStorage
Frontend: authFetch helper exists for native fetch() calls
Frontend: NO withCredentials: true anywhere in frontend src
Frontend: NO credentials: include anywhere in frontend src
Frontend: AuthContext stores session_token to localStorage on login (line 40)
Frontend: AuthContext removes session_token from localStorage on logout (line 59)
Frontend: SchemeOfWorkForm uses authFetch (line 3, 11)
Frontend: MyFiles uses authFetch (line 3, 22, 49)
Frontend: LessonPreview uses authFetch (line 4, 36)
Frontend: Service worker skips cross-origin requests (line 39-42)
Frontend: index.html no longer has Google Sign-In style link tag
Frontend: Dashboard loads with Bearer token auth - shows user 'Test User TTS' with PRO badge
Frontend: MyHub page loads with Bearer token auth - shows My Files section
Frontend: Scheme of Work page loads with Bearer token auth - shows form and table
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_bearer_auth.py (new test file for Bearer token auth)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user (test-user-tts) and session (test_session_tts_001) from previous iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bearer token auth migration complete. All frontend files now use Authorization header from localStorage instead of cookies. api.js has axios interceptor and authFetch helper. AuthContext handles token storage/removal. Service worker skips cross-origin requests. CORS configured with allow_credentials=False.

bearer_token_auth.backend: GET /api/auth/me works with Authorization: Bearer header
bearer_token_auth.frontend: axios interceptor adds Authorization header from localStorage

google_auth_response.backend: POST /api/auth/google returns session_token in response body (line 908)

no_withCredentials.frontend: No withCredentials: true found in any frontend file

no_credentials_include.frontend: No credentials: include found in any frontend file
